top_signals.title: Gold Steadies as Traders Weigh Rate Path on US-Iran Deal Hopes
top_signals.summary: Gold erased losses as hopes of a US-Iran ceasefire deal eased bets that central banks may need to keep interest rates higher for longer to combat inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Traders think this legacy tech stock is the ultimate quantum play
top_signals.summary: Options traders stormed into the stock, trading almost 200,000 contracts, on pace for 15 times the daily average of the past 30 days.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
